belier.intro: The Moon sits at 21 degrees of your own sign today, and the waning gibbous light at 67 percent illumination still carries real force even as it begins its descent. This first house placement puts you squarely at the center of your own story, and with Saturn and Neptune both retrograde in Aries alongside this Moon, the question of who you are becoming feels both urgent and unresolved. The Leo Sun warms your fifth house, adding a spark of creative confidence to an otherwise introspective day.
belier.love: Saturn retrograde in your first house has been asking you to take responsibility for the patterns you bring into closeness, and today that work continues quietly. A partner may notice you are more measured than usual; this is maturity showing itself, not distance.
belier.work: Your instincts are strong today, but Neptune's retrograde fog in your own sign can blur the line between genuine insight and wishful thinking. Test your ideas against evidence before committing fully to a new direction.
belier.energy: Your fire runs high but slightly diffuse under this gibbous Moon, more like a wide bed of embers than a single flame. Physical movement, especially something competitive or bold, channels it well.
belier.intuition: With Neptune retrograde exactly where you stand, your gut feelings are amplified but not always accurate. Sit with a strong impression for a full day before acting on it.
belier.mantra: I build my identity on truth, not urgency.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon at 21 degrees Aries moves through your twelfth house today, pulling you toward solitude even as the waning gibbous phase keeps energy levels relatively high. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in this same hidden zone continue their long, slow work of dissolving old fears and replacing them with quieter, more honest self-knowledge. The Leo Sun illuminates your fourth house, keeping home and family matters warmly present in the background of your day.
taureau.love: Private feelings you have not yet voiced deserve attention today. The twelfth house favors reflection over declaration, so let a tender thought sit with you before you decide whether and how to share it.
taureau.work: Behind-the-scenes tasks, planning, and quiet preparation serve you better than public visibility today. Trust that unseen groundwork is still real progress.
taureau.energy: Your grounded nature benefits from more rest than usual, even under this brighter Moon. Do not mistake restlessness for a signal to push harder.
taureau.intuition: Dreams and half-formed images carry unusual weight today. Keep a note nearby to capture what surfaces before it fades.
taureau.mantra: I trust what surfaces when I stop forcing answers.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon at 21 degrees Aries lights your eleventh house today, bringing sociable, forward-looking energy even as it wanes from its fullest point. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in this zone of friendship and future plans continue to test which alliances are built on solid ground and which have relied on shared fantasy. The Leo Sun in your third house keeps your natural wit and curiosity especially active.
gemeaux.love: A friendship that has quietly become something more may ask for honest naming today. Saturn retrograde favors clarity over ambiguity, even when clarity requires a harder conversation.
gemeaux.work: Group projects and networking benefit from a realistic assessment of who is actually pulling their weight. Trust the pattern you have observed over the pattern you hoped for.
gemeaux.energy: Mental energy is quick and social today, well suited to conversation and collaborative brainstorming rather than solitary focus.
gemeaux.intuition: Your read on a group's true dynamics is sharper than usual. If something has felt off in a collective effort, today confirms it.
gemeaux.mantra: I choose connections built on truth, not convenience.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon at 21 degrees Aries moves through your tenth house today, keeping career matters visible and slightly demanding even as the waning gibbous light softens toward balance. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in this public zone continue asking whether your professional path reflects your actual values or an old, borrowed ambition. The Leo Sun in your own second house keeps questions of security and self-worth close to the surface.
cancer.love: Emotional needs may take a back seat to practical demands today, and that is acceptable for now. A partner who understands your drive without needing constant reassurance is a genuine gift.
cancer.work: Saturn retrograde asks you to prove your professional direction is earned rather than assumed. A structural decision made today carries more weight than it might seem to at first.
cancer.energy: Your emotional tides run steady rather than dramatic today, giving you unusual staying power for demanding tasks.
cancer.intuition: A quiet sense about your public direction, one you may have dismissed as ambition or anxiety, deserves a closer look today.
cancer.mantra: I build a career that honors who I really am.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon at 21 degrees Aries fills your ninth house with adventurous, expansive energy today, even as the waning gibbous phase asks you to begin consolidating rather than only exploring. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in this zone of belief and long-range vision continue refining which of your ideals are load-bearing and which were only inspiring. With the Sun in your own sign, your confidence and warmth remain naturally high.
lion.love: A partner's differing worldview may surface today in a way that clarifies rather than threatens the relationship. Let the conversation go where it needs to go.
lion.work: Big-picture thinking about your direction serves you well, but Saturn retrograde insists that any grand vision be grounded in a workable plan.
lion.energy: Your solar vitality is strong today, and the ninth house Moon adds a restless, exploratory quality. Channel it into learning something genuinely new.
lion.intuition: A conviction you have held for a long time may be quietly tested today. If it holds up, it is truly yours; if not, release it without shame.
lion.mantra: I hold beliefs that are mine, earned and tested.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon at 21 degrees Aries moves through your eighth house today, stirring intensity around shared resources and emotional depth even as the light begins to wane from its fullest point. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in this transformative zone continue the patient work of separating real intimacy from convenient illusion. The Leo Sun in your twelfth house keeps a layer of private processing running quietly beneath your usual practical focus.
vierge.love: Depth is available today if you are willing to move past surface reassurance. A conversation about trust or vulnerability, handled with care, can deepen a bond considerably.
vierge.work: Financial or contractual matters benefit from Saturn's insistence on clear terms. Do not accept vague arrangements when precision is available.
vierge.energy: Your steady earth energy holds well even under this intense eighth house influence, but allow extra time for emotional processing.
vierge.intuition: A subtle sense about someone else's true intentions in a shared financial or emotional matter deserves your attention today.
vierge.mantra: I seek depth over comfortable illusion.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon at 21 degrees Aries opposes your sign from the seventh house today, casting a bright but still waning light directly onto your closest partnerships. Saturn and Neptune retrograde there continue asking whether a key relationship is built on mutual respect or on an idealized version of the other person. The Leo Sun in your eleventh house keeps friendships and shared goals warmly active in the background.
balance.love: A relationship may show you its true structure today, for better or worse. Saturn retrograde favors honest commitment over comfortable avoidance.
balance.work: Negotiations and partnerships benefit from directness. State your actual terms rather than managing around them diplomatically.
balance.energy: Balance comes through relationship today rather than solitude. Time spent with the right people restores you more than time alone.
balance.intuition: Your read on a partner's real motivations is unusually accurate today. Trust the steady signal over reassuring words.
balance.mantra: I seek partnership grounded in honesty, not fantasy.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon at 21 degrees Aries moves through your sixth house today, bringing focus to routine and wellbeing even as the waning gibbous light begins its gradual release. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in this zone of daily discipline continue testing whether your habits genuinely support you or merely feel productive. The Leo Sun in your tenth house keeps career visibility elevated and demanding.
scorpion.love: Small daily gestures matter more than grand statements today. A partner who shows up consistently is worth more than one who only shows up dramatically.
scorpion.work: Saturn retrograde rewards discipline over inspiration today. A structured, unglamorous approach to your responsibilities will outperform a burst of enthusiasm.
scorpion.energy: Your intensity is well served by physical routine today. A workout or disciplined task channels restlessness productively.
scorpion.intuition: Your body continues to signal which habits are sustainable and which are quietly costing you. Listen before the signal grows louder.
scorpion.mantra: I choose habits that truly serve my strength.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon at 21 degrees Aries brightens your fifth house today, bringing creative and romantic energy even as the light wanes from its fullest point. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in this zone of self-expression continue asking which of your creative pursuits are genuinely yours and which were performed for an audience. The Leo Sun in your ninth house keeps your appetite for meaning and adventure especially strong.
sagittaire.love: Romantic energy is playful but wants substance today. A lighthearted moment can deepen into something real if you let it.
sagittaire.work: Creative work benefits from Saturn's discipline today. Give a loose idea real structure and it may finally become something finished.
sagittaire.energy: Your fire is bright and expressive today, well suited to performance, creation, or bold self-presentation.
sagittaire.intuition: A creative impulse that feels almost too personal to share is likely your most honest work. Trust it.
sagittaire.mantra: I create honestly, without performing for approval.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon at 21 degrees Aries moves through your fourth house today, keeping home and family themes active even as the waning gibbous light begins to soften. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in this foundational zone continue their long work of separating genuine security from inherited assumption. The Leo Sun in your eighth house adds intensity to matters of shared resources and trust.
capricorne.love: A partner's honesty about family or home matters deserves careful listening today rather than quick reassurance.
capricorne.work: Home-based responsibilities may compete with professional ones today. Saturn retrograde asks you to set a clear, sustainable boundary between the two.
capricorne.energy: Grounding activities at home, cooking, organizing, or simple repair, restore you more than external stimulation today.
capricorne.intuition: A pattern inherited from your family of origin may surface today, asking to be examined rather than automatically repeated.
capricorne.mantra: I build security on truth, not inheritance alone.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon at 21 degrees Aries fills your third house today with quick, communicative energy even as the waning gibbous light steadies. Saturn retrograde continues its work in your own sign, asking you to structure your individuality with discipline rather than reactive rebellion. Neptune retrograde alongside it in Aries keeps some of your self-concept in productive fog, while the Leo Sun in your seventh house keeps a key relationship prominent.
verseau.love: A direct conversation serves you better than a subtle hint today. Say the thing plainly and let the relationship respond to truth.
verseau.work: Writing, correspondence, and short-term planning are favored today. Keep communication clear and avoid overcomplicating a simple message.
verseau.energy: Mental energy is quick today, but Saturn's retrograde in your sign asks you to pair it with discipline rather than scatter it.
verseau.intuition: A nagging thought about your own direction, one Saturn has been quietly shaping for months, deserves serious consideration today.
verseau.mantra: I structure my individuality with patience and clarity.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon at 21 degrees Aries moves through your second house today, keeping questions of security and self-worth active even as the waning gibbous light begins its descent. Saturn and Neptune retrograde in this material zone continue stripping away comforting illusions about money and value, replacing them slowly with something more durable. The Leo Sun in your sixth house keeps daily routines and responsibilities firmly in focus.
poissons.love: What you value in a relationship, beyond comfort or convenience, deserves honest reflection today.
poissons.work: A financial review or a hard look at your actual worth in a professional arrangement is favored today, even if the process is uncomfortable.
poissons.energy: Your energy responds well to simplification today. Release one unnecessary obligation and notice the difference it makes.
poissons.intuition: Your sense of your own value, apart from what others have told you, is unusually clear today. Trust it over old, borrowed narratives.
poissons.mantra: I know my worth without needing others to confirm it.
poissons.author: Sibylle
